title: HRIS worker lifecycle (joiner/mover/leaver) state
description: One record per worker across an HRIS (Rippling, BambooHR): the worker's employment-lifecycle state (active / terminated / on-leave / pending), start (hire) date, end (termination) date, role/title, department, the manager ASSIGNMENT id (for access-review routing), and the work email (the only contact field — the access-review join key). Pulled read-only from the HRIS employee-directory API with a minimal field selector. The HRIS holds the most sensitive PII in the customer's stack; this evidence kind collects WORKER-LIFECYCLE FACTS ONLY and DELIBERATELY EXCLUDES SSN / national id, compensation / salary, home address, bank / payment details, benefits / health enrollment, performance-review fields, date of birth, personal phone, and gender / ethnicity / protected-class data — those fields are never requested and never enter the append-only evidence ledger (constitutional invariant #2). The connector reports descriptive lifecycle facts; the platform evaluator owns the access-review pass/fail per (control, scope) by reconciling this authoritative roster against the IdP/app entitlements (joiner/mover/leaver — SOC 2 CC6.1/CC6.2/CC6.3). Shared across the Rippling + BambooHR connectors because the two HRIS systems' lifecycle field set is identical at this altitude; the source_hris field preserves provenance.

source_hris.description: HRIS the record was collected from.

worker_id.description: HRIS-native stable identifier of the worker (opaque, non-secret) — the stable key.

employment_status.description: The worker's lifecycle state. The evaluator distinguishes active (good) from terminated (must be off all entitlements — the leaver signal).

start_date.description: Optional hire / start date (the joiner fact), as an ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: Optional end / termination date (the leaver fact), as an ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

title.description: Optional role / job title (the mover fact). Descriptive, non-sensitive.

department.description: Optional department / team (the mover fact). Descriptive, non-sensitive.

manager_assignment_id.description: Optional OPAQUE worker id of this worker's manager — the minimum identity to route an access review. NEVER the manager's personal contact detail.

work_email.description: Optional WORK email — the only contact field collected, and only because the access-review join keys the roster against IdP/app accounts by work email. NEVER a personal email.
